# Self-Service Resources

At Acme Shop, our Self-Service Resources aim to enhance your shopping experience by providing quick assistance options. This includes a comprehensive Help Centre filled with articles on various topics like order tracking, returns, and payment issues, alongside a FAQs section addressing common inquiries about shipping and returns. Additionally, our 24/7 Virtual Assistant can assist with tasks such as checking order status and modifying orders, and can connect you to a live agent if needed.

[Source: customer_support.md#self-service-resources]
